title: Create: Lemonmates
description: A simple mod adding lemonades and detailed production steps using the Create mod.
body:
--- **Create: Lemon-Mates** is an addon mod for Create, adding various lemonade drinks and everything you need to produce them - bottles, labels, caps, fruits and of course lemonade. Build your own lemonade factory with fully automated Create assembly lines; and drink them out of decorated glasses at dinner with your friends or the local villagers.

### Core Systems - Realistic bottle production using bioplastic - Lemonade mixing using different fruit combinations for 5 flavours - Drinking glasses to place down, decorate and drink out of in over 10,000 variations ### Other Features - Tree and bush generation for the fruits - 2 new wood sets for all wooden blocks and boats ### Compatibility - Cheaper Label production with Create: Enchantment Industry - Automated fruit slicing with Create: Slice & Dice, and/or manual with Farmer's Delight - Direct chest boat crafting when the corresponding Quark segment is enabled - Fruits can be used as projectiles with the potato cannon ### Translation & Localisation - All items, blocks and tags are localized - English (en_us): 100% - German/Deutsch (de_de): 100%, added with 2.0.0
